title: Air Quality REST API
description: A Flask REST API that trains and serves machine-learning models to predict air quality from weather and sensor data. Containerised with Docker and deployed on Kubernetes behind Nginx and Gunicorn, with a Swagger-documented API.

title: Crypto Prophet
description: A FastAPI service that trains machine-learning models to forecast cryptocurrency prices, exposing predictions through a documented REST API. Packaged with Docker for reproducible deployments.

title: Task Manager
description: A full-stack task-management app: a Spring Boot REST API with secured authentication and MongoDB persistence, paired with a Vue.js frontend for registering, logging in and managing tasks.
